Event: Winter Festival 2025
Event Date: 01/12/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: T164
Muscle Memory Totem

Once in a while, the unit removes 4 random positive effects from 3 nearest enemy units each, and steals 20% of all their stats for 4 sec.
Stacks up to 8 times.

- Level 20
Once in a while, the unit removes 5 random positive effects from 3 nearest enemy units each, and steals 25% of all their stats for 5 sec. Stacks up to 8 times.

- Level 40
Once in a while, the unit removes 6 random positive effects from 3 nearest enemy units each, and steals 30% of all their stats for 6 sec. Stacks up to 8 times.

Requirements: 90

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌚🌚
